title: boothia californica
intro: Boothia californica, also known as California goldenseal, is a perennial plant native to the western coast of North America, belonging to the Berberidaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its berberine content, which has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Boothia californica include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular choice for treating various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
